title: Cameron crypto follow-up + drugs-as-Mario-banana thesis (2021)
html:
Cameron crypto follow-up + drugs-as-Mario-banana thesis (2021)

Source: 2021-12-05 Apple Note. Two memorable thought-units: a follow-up DM draft to a stranger met talking crypto, and a clean-articulated drugs metaphor.

TL;DR

  • Cold-DM follow-up to "Cameron": "Hey Cameron this is YG, how are you doing dude. I don't know if you remember, but we met last night talking about crypto." — captures Yahir's cold-outreach voice in the Corvallis Crypto Club orbit.
  • "Molding sandwich is a great analogy for something repulsive" — random analogy capture; Yahir collects vivid metaphors as a writing-craft input.
  • THE THESIS: "Drugs are a minor distraction, that done little, may not matter in the long term. But continuous minor distractions adds up to major blunders. Like a banana in Mario Kart. Simply annoying and needing to be avoided." — clearest single-line drugs framework in the corpus. Sits 1 month after the 2021 11 05 self warning on drinking/smoking.
  • "Thesis on drugs" — explicit note to himself to write a longer piece on this. (Did he? Worth checking the 2024 mega notebook and Substack drafts.)
  • OSU sophomore year voice: half cold-outreach hustler, half philosophy-essayist. Both modes co-existing on a Sunday night.

Connections

  • corvallis crypto club
  • 2021 11 05 ceos of the future need engineering
  • osu
  • surface area of luck
  • 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook — possible later thesis-on-drugs surface
